name: Relevance AI
description: No-code platform for building and deploying AI agents. Focus on internal assistants and team automation. Enterprise-grade infrastructure with SOC 2 Type II compliance, GDPR, SSO, RBAC, version control, and monitoring dashboards.
notes: No-code agent platform with enterprise infrastructure. SOC 2 Type II & GDPR certified. Full version history, monitoring dashboards, cost tracking, and evaluation tools.
